Cleared, funded and closed.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU) dead — no earnest money. Clearing complete. New prospect interested in subdividing or alternate use. Lead with net after close on any new offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve on new prospect showing. Post drone footage. Lead with net after close on next offer.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect reached out wanting to show — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Strategy: land-only cash deal.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. Drone footage flagged as next priority. First offer confirmed dead.
Current offer basically dead. Option money not received. Steve more open to overall picture on offers.
RBFCU financing decision expected Apr 10.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Two estimates compared: HouzzPro/Matt Toney ($54,877) vs T&T/Kendall ($61,980). Bank connected Matt Toney directly. Dumpsters dropped Saturday — work is active and moving as of May 11.
deals.next: Meet Matt Toney and project manager on site today. Monitor work progress. Establish listing timeline once work complete.

logs.m: Chris heading to property to meet Matt Toney and PM on site. Dumpsters running since Saturday — work is active.
Work officially starting — Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met with Matt Toney in his office. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler on a call. Goal: work starts by next Monday.
Two estimates fully compared. Jerry emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as decision-maker.
Kendall pricing flagged as too high. Shopping alternatives. Self-manage option still explored.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater VA listing. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Sellers double-carrying apartment plus $2,843.85/month mortgage. Vacant 6 months. 208 DOM. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or price cut with cash to close.
deals.next: Get feedback from May 5 showing. Resolve lawn care. Check in with Matt and Chandler on path decision. Talk to broker on short sale protocol.

logs.m: Checking property while in Devine. Still need May 5 showing feedback. Grass still unresolved.
Dropping sign and lockbox at property when in Devine.
Outside agent showing at 2pm. Lawn care referral from Garry Stephens — Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804. A.M. Lawn Care also visiting for quote.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off given CMA. Showing Monday May 4 at 2pm.
Full market analysis completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths identified and documented.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Landlord renovating duplex, rents going up. Pivoted to new construction — no HOA required. Pre-approval in progress with Zach Schaphorst. Sent new construction search platform Apr 16.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval amount with Zach. Identify no-HOA new construction communities. Schedule model home visits.

Text from Mike — rental being sold. 916 Marriott assessed and passed. New construction introduced — they were open to it.
Connected with Zach Schaphorst. Debt paid off. 30-day wait for credit pull. Pre-approval target Feb 2026.

deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis for Homestead Vested. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA showed avg sale price $207K and estimated value $266K. Used as basis for branded property analysis template build.

deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC by second week of June. Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13. Recommended list price $259,900. Potential hairline foundation crack — flagged for disclosure.
deals.next: Drop sign and lockbox Tuesday May 12. Launch MLS listing Wednesday May 13. Canvas neighborhood Tuesday afternoon.

Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13.

Katy reviewing listing agreement. Payoff discrepancy still unresolved — $170K stated vs $192K public records.
Listing consultation on-site went well. Seller packet delivered. Foundation crack discussed. Chris and Isaac had lunch — met Adam.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing with development potential. Sisters wanted to end listing after March but were excited about Isaac development interest. Title defect found: Deed #20100079485 has incomplete legal description — Exhibits C and F never attached. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. Isaac offered ~$150K contingent on mobile home project.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement to check who signed. Call sisters. Get attorney fee estimate from Van Hutchins. Follow up with Isaac on mobile home project timeline.

logs.m: Jennifer Ball (co-owner) emailed — hired attorney Van Hutchins, title defect confirmed. Correction Deed being prepared. Jennifer did not sign off on price decrease.
Updated sisters on Apr 20 showing. Isaac interested in developing with mobile homes — ~$150K offer. Sisters enthusiastic.
Showing occurred.
Noted as active call priority. Past and recent prospects need outreach.
